user.title: Halo Home
user.description: How should the mesh passphrase be obtained? It is fetched once and stored locally — the cloud is never used after setup.

menu_options.cloud: Sign in to Avi-on / Halo Home

cloud.title: Sign in to Avi-on
cloud.description:
Used once, to read the mesh passphrase for your location. Your password is not stored.

Avi-on's servers are expected to shut down around November 2028. Run tools/avion_backup.py and keep the result somewhere safe — without it, these lights cannot be set up again.

backup.title: Restore from backup
backup.description: Path to the avion_backup.json created by tools/avion_backup.py. This works with no internet connection and no Avi-on account, which is why it will still work after the cloud shuts down.

error.invalid_auth: Avi-on rejected that email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Avi-on API.
error.invalid_backup: That file could not be parsed as an Avi-on backup.

abort.already_configured: This location is already set up.
